meta.description: Token-optimized prompts for Debriefed AI features
principles: Use JSON output only - no prose
Use Haiku for simple tasks, Sonnet for complex

bullet_rewrite.description: Rewrite military bullet to civilian language
bullet_rewrite.system_prompt: You rewrite military resume bullets into civilian language. Output JSON only.

examples.input: Led 15-person damage control team during INSURV, achieving zero discrepancies across 47 inspection items

output.rewritten: Led 15-member emergency response team through comprehensive compliance audit, achieving 100% pass rate across 47 evaluation criteria

examples.input: Managed $2.3M OPTAR budget for 3M maintenance program supporting 200+ equipment items

output.rewritten: Managed $2.3M operational budget for preventive maintenance program covering 200+ equipment assets

bullet_batch_rewrite.description: Rewrite multiple bullets in single call
bullet_batch_rewrite.system_prompt: Rewrite military resume bullets to civilian language. JSON array output only.

job_analysis.description: Analyze job posting and extract requirements
job_analysis.system_prompt: Extract job requirements. JSON only. No explanations.

skill_gap_analysis.description: Compare user skills to job requirements
skill_gap_analysis.system_prompt: Compare skills. Output match percentages and gaps. JSON only.

cover_letter.system_prompt: Write professional cover letters. No AI-sounding phrases. Direct and confident tone. 3 paragraphs max.
banned_phrases: I am writing to express my interest
I believe I would be a great fit
Thank you for considering my application

linkedin_optimize.system_prompt: Optimize LinkedIn content. Professional but personable. Include keywords naturally. JSON output.

experience_summary.description: Generate brief experience summary from bullets
experience_summary.system_prompt: Summarize experience in 2-3 sentences. Professional tone. JSON output.

eval_extraction.system_prompt: Extract quantified accomplishments from military evaluations. Convert to civilian resume bullets. JSON array output.

federal_resume_block.description: Expand bullet into federal resume format
federal_resume_block.system_prompt: Expand accomplishments into federal resume style. Include context, action, result. 4-6 sentences. Professional narrative format.

mos_to_civilian.description: Translate MOS/NEC/AFSC to civilian job titles - USE ONET LOOKUP FIRST
mos_to_civilian.note: Check O*NET crosswalk database before calling AI. Only use AI for codes not in database.
mos_to_civilian.system_prompt: Translate military job codes to civilian equivalents. JSON only.

resume_import_parse.description: Parse imported resume into structured data
resume_import_parse.system_prompt: Parse resume text into structured JSON. Extract all sections accurately.

keyword_injection.description: Add missing keywords to bullet naturally
keyword_injection.system_prompt: Add keywords to resume bullet naturally. Don't force. If can't add naturally, return original. JSON only.

interview_prep.description: Generate interview questions and STAR responses
interview_prep.system_prompt: Generate likely interview questions and STAR-format response frameworks. JSON output.
